name: @kitsoki/object-graph-ui
description: Build-only package for @kitsoki/object-graph's kit UI module (S5, .context/kits-implementation-plan.md D3). `pnpm build` writes graph.mjs next to this file — that IS the served asset (internal/runstatus/server/kit_ui.go serves <kit-root>/ui/<entry>.mjs) — so the built output is checked in rather than generated at server-serve time. No dev server: this is a library build, not an app.
